question_text: In a class of five students P, Q, R, S and T, only one student is known to have

options.C: opied in the exam. The disciplinary committee has investigated the situation
options.A: nd recorded the statements from the students as given below. Statement of P: R has copied in the exam. Statement of Q: S has copied in the exam. Statement of R: P did not copy in the exam. Statement of S: Only one of us is telling the truth. Statement of T: R is telling the truth. The investigating team had authentic information that S never lies.
options.B: ased on the information given above, the person who has copied in the exam is
